title: ai-squad Cost Report
description: Canonical scoped cost artifact written at session end to .agent-session/<spec_id>/cost-report.json. The presence of this file means cost reconciliation ran and the numbers are authoritative; consumers must treat its absence as 'preliminary'. When scoping_suspect is true, implementation_cost_usd is NOT trustworthy and consumers must display 'unknown' rather than the figure. Produced by cost_report.write_cost_report_json; consumed read-only by external observers.

implementation_cost_usd.description: Implementation subagents cost in USD. Untrustworthy when scoping_suspect is true.

total_cost_usd.description: Sum of the three phase costs.

excluded_subagents.description: Out-of-scope cost files ignored on read (foreign session/project contamination). Surfaced, never silently dropped.

recovered_subagents.description: Subagents recovered after the sanity floor tripped (Spec B). 0 on the normal path.

scoping_suspect.description: True when scoping kept 0 subagents but excluded some AND recovery was not safe. When true, implementation_cost_usd must not be presented as final.

unpriced_models.description: Models encountered with no known price.

complete.description: True only when something was measured AND everything measured was priced.

tokens.description: Token counts. by_phase keyed by phase, by_type keyed by token type, plus a total.

token_cost.description: Token cost breakdown. by_phase keyed by phase, by_type keyed by token type.

spec_id.description: Session/feature id; must match the .agent-session/<spec_id>/ directory name.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the reconciliation that produced this report.

mode.description: Present only for free/observed sessions (/observe). Signals no phase machine: the whole main-session spend sits in the planning bucket and `complete` does not require subagents.
